segments.title: Walk-on & meet
segments.cap: Both walk on from opposite sides and meet in the center of the floor.

segments.title: First hold & settle
segments.cap: Hands join into closed position; settle face-to-face and find the pulse.

segments.title: Closed-position sway
segments.lyric: So if our time is running out
segments.cap: Gentle side-to-side sway with a slow clockwise drift; small traveling steps.

segments.title: Open-out & underarm turn
segments.cap: He opens her to the "V" on a stationary raised arm; she opens out and turns underneath, back to face him.

segments.title: Dress-flourish fan-out
segments.lyric: I take one look at you
segments.cap: Solo presentation: arms wide, gown spread — a picture beat.

segments.title: Close embrace & sway
segments.lyric: You take me out of the ordinary
segments.cap: Draw back together into a close embrace; sway with small quarter-turns.

segments.title: Sway with quarter-turns
segments.lyric: On the edge of your knife, stayin' drunk on your vine
segments.cap: Continue the closed sway, rotating a little more as the chorus lands.

segments.title: Traveling rotation
segments.lyric: So this world will be ordinary
segments.cap: Semi-closed hold rotating and traveling across the floor; the gown sweeps.

segments.title: Rotation into the line
segments.lyric: Somethin' 'bout you, you can touch me to dust
segments.cap: The rotation gathers and opens toward the big extension.

segments.title: The reach & lunge (open line)
segments.lyric: The angels up in the clouds are jealous…
segments.cap: Wide two-arm extension into a shared lunge — hold the shape, then reel back in. SIGNATURE POSE.

segments.title: Reel in & promenade
segments.cap: Gather from the line back to hold, then step into a promenade walk.

segments.title: Walk-around & underarm turn
segments.cap: Hand-to-hand, walking around each other with a calm underarm turn.

segments.title: Hand-to-hand walk-around
segments.cap: Keep one point of connection; circle each other, breathing room before the build.

segments.title: Gather toward center
segments.lyric: Oh, my, my — taking me out
segments.cap: Draw back together toward the center, weight settling for the build.

segments.title: Push-pull tension
segments.lyric: I want you layin' me down…
segments.cap: Hand-to-hand push-pull; he sets his base as she commits her weight toward him.

segments.title: Rotating pickup lift
segments.cap: Feet off the floor, gown cascading, rotating together. SIGNATURE LIFT — soft surface first, lift with legs.

segments.title: Soft landing embrace
segments.cap: Lower gently into an embrace and recover the frame.

segments.title: Open-arms presentation
segments.lyric: The angels up in the clouds
segments.cap: Side-by-side, big arms, chin up — present to the room.

segments.title: Solo spin away
segments.cap: Follow spins out and back, setting up the final lift.

segments.title: Climactic finale lift
segments.cap: The big finale lift — the picture moment — then lower toward the embrace. SIGNATURE LIFT.

segments.title: Final embrace & bow
segments.cap: Settle into the closing embrace and hold. The video's branding cards play over the end.
